steps.title: Translate the problem into an equation
steps.content: The product of $s$ and $(s-1)$ equals 272, giving us: $$s(s-1) = 272$$

steps.title: Backsolve with choice B
steps.content: Backsolving — testing choice B (17): If $s = 17$, then $17 \cdot 16 = 272$. ✓ That matches choice B — B is correct.
